name: kie-ai-workflows
description: Codex plugin for Kie.ai image and video workflows using the kie-api toolkit.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and videos with Kie.ai through guided Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin for Kie.ai image and video workflows. It helps users start with API key setup, check credits, run a Nano Banana test, create Kling videos, chain image-to-video flows, and retrieve the latest generated media from the local artifact library.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up Kie.ai and check my credits.
Generate a Nano Banana image from a prompt.
Create a Kling video from my latest image.
